name: chr14_q32_33_IGH_locus_master
description: Immunoglobulin heavy chain locus on minus strand of chr14q32.33, ~1.25 Mb, hosts somatic class-switch recombination and germline NAHR between constant-region paralogs IGHG1/2/3/4, IGHA1/2, IGHE, and the pseudogene paralogs IGHGP, IGHEP1, IGHEP2.

architecture.internal_structure: VH segments -> D segments -> JH cluster -> Cmu -> Cdelta -> Cgamma3 -> Cgamma1 -> Cgamma-pseudo (IGHGP) -> Calpha1 -> Cgamma2 -> Cgamma4 -> Cepsilon -> Calpha2 plus pseudo Cepsilon segments
